vocab.meaning: làm rạng rỡ, làm sáng sủa không gian
vocab.example: I love keeping a few succulents on my desk because they really brighten up my workspace.

vocab.meaning: trang hoàng, làm cho đẹp đẽ/gọn gàng hơn
vocab.example: Adding some indoor plants is a cost-effective way to spruce up a living room without buying new furniture.
The lush green leaves of the Monstera really go with the minimalist aesthetic of my apartment.
To be honest, I find it quite therapeutic to care for my plants after a stressful day at the office.
My mother is the one who mainly looks after the garden, ensuring every plant gets enough sunlight.
I tend to avoid large bushes because they take up too much room in my small studio apartment.
I used to have a black thumb, and unfortunately, most of my indoor ferns would just die off within weeks.

vocab.meaning: làm tôn lên, làm lộ ra
vocab.example: The natural light in the balcony really brings out the vibrant colors of the blooming flowers.

vocab.meaning: phân phát, cung cấp (nước, phân bón) một cách cẩn thận
vocab.example: You have to be careful not to dole out too much water, as overwatering can lead to root rot.
Once a month, I have to cut back the overgrown vines to keep the balcony looking neat and tidy.
